title: container stats: fix --no-stream race
body:
Fix a race in `podman container stats` by waiting for the client to
consume the data in the channel.  This requires a `sync.WaitGroup` (or
semaphore) in the client and to also close the channel the backend.

Fixes: #6405
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@baude PTAL

Somehow related: I find the [pod stats implementation](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/cmd/podman/pods/stats.go#L77) slightly less complicated as all the streaming logic is part of `cmd/podman` while the API always returns the stats of one call. This also allows for separating CLI and API options (see https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/cmd/podman/pods/stats.go#L24).
